onboarding.business_description: Local residential and commercial plumbing company serving the greater Seattle area. Family-owned, 15 years in business.
onboarding.target_audience: Homeowners and property managers in Seattle, Bellevue, and surrounding suburbs. Ages 30-60, concerned about quality and reliability.
project_goals: Generate more online leads through SEO
Build trust and credibility with a professional website
Make it easy to request a quote
onboarding.design_style_preferences: Clean, trustworthy, professional. Not too corporate. Friendly and approachable.
